nasb.text: When the Lamb broke the seventh seal, there was silence in heaven for about half an hour.

esv.text: When the Lamb opened the seventh seal, there was silence in heaven for about half an hour.

cnv.text: 羊羔揭開第七個印的時候，天上靜默了大約半小時。

ccb.text: 羔羊揭开第七印时，天上寂静无声，约半小时。

csbs.text: 羔羊打开第七个封印的时候，天上寂静无声，约有半小时。
